end,{},function(P)local W,h=-619256-(-619257),P[-508559+508560]while h do D[h],W=D[h]-(798025-798024),W+(-899576-(-899577))if-705550+705550==D[h]then D[h],f[h]=nil,nil end h=P[W]end end,function(P)D[P]=D[P]-(41457-41456)if-376969-(-376969)==D[P]then D[P],f[P]=nil,nil end end return(I(13471899-(-302673),{}))(l(z))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[W(-294805-(-293713))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
